examples.title: Pseudocode: Thread Creation
examples.code:
PROCEDURE CreateThread(
 threadFunction: FUNCTION,
 threadArgs: DATA
)
 CREATE NEW THREAD
 SET THREAD FUNCTION TO threadFunction
 SET THREAD ARGUMENTS TO threadArgs
 START THREAD
END PROCEDURE
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic steps involved in creating a new thread.

examples.title: Python: Thread Creation
examples.description: Demonstrates thread creation in Python using the threading module
examples.code:
import threading

def thread_function(data):
 print(f'Thread executed with data: {data}')

# Create a new thread
thread = threading.Thread(target=thread_function, args=('Hello from thread',))

# Start the thread
thread.start()

# Wait for the thread to finish
thread.join()
examples.explanation: This Python code creates a new thread using the threading module and starts it.

examples.title: C: Thread Creation using POSIX Threads
examples.description: Demonstrates thread creation in C using POSIX Threads
examples.explanation: This C code creates a new thread using POSIX Threads and starts it.
